fqdn.title: FQDN refers to the namespace dns of Azure Event Hubs to be used i.e. <namespace>.servicebus.windows.net

hubName.title: HubName refers to the Azure Event Hub to send events to

parameters.title:
Parameters is the list of key-value extracted from event's payload that are applied to
the trigger resource.
+optional

payload.description: Payload is the list of key-value extracted from an event payload to construct the request payload.

sharedAccessKey.title: SharedAccessKey refers to a K8s secret containing the primary key for the

sharedAccessKeyName.title: SharedAccessKeyName refers to the name of the Shared Access Key
